parameters.query:
SELECT id, occurrence_count, raw_finding_ids, validation_status
FROM normalized_findings
WHERE dedup_fingerprint = '{{ $json.dedup_fingerprint }}'
  AND engagement_id = '{{ $json.engagement_id }}'
LIMIT 1;

UPDATE normalized_findings SET
  occurrence_count = occurrence_count + 1,
  last_seen = NOW(),
  raw_finding_ids = array_append(raw_finding_ids, '{{ $('Build Dedup Fingerprint').first().json.raw_finding_id }}'::uuid)
WHERE id = '{{ $json.id }}'
RETURNING id, occurrence_count;
UPDATE raw_findings SET status = 'merged' WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Dedup Fingerprint').first().json.raw_finding_id }}';

SELECT COUNT(*) as prior_count
FROM normalized_findings nf
JOIN engagements e ON nf.engagement_id = e.id
WHERE e.client_id = (SELECT client_id FROM engagements WHERE id = '{{ $('Build Dedup Fingerprint').first().json.engagement_id }}')
  AND nf.dedup_fingerprint = '{{ $('Build Dedup Fingerprint').first().json.dedup_fingerprint }}'
  AND nf.engagement_id != '{{ $('Build Dedup Fingerprint').first().json.engagement_id }}';

INSERT INTO normalized_findings (
  engagement_id, asset_id, raw_finding_ids, title, category, cwe_id, owasp_category,
  severity, dedup_fingerprint, is_recurring, recurrence_count,
  evidence_summary, validation_status, first_seen, last_seen
) VALUES (
  '{{ $json.engagement_id }}',
  '{{ $json.asset_id }}',
  ARRAY['{{ $json.raw_finding_id }}'::uuid],
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g,"''") }}',
  '{{ $json.category }}',
  {{ $json.cwe_id ? "'" + $json.cwe_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.owasp_category ? "'" + $json.owasp_category + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.severity }}',
  '{{ $json.dedup_fingerprint }}',
  {{ $json.is_recurring }},
  {{ $json.recurrence_count }},
  '{{ $json.raw_evidence.replace(/'/g,"''").substring(0,500) }}',
  'pending_analyst',
  NOW(), NOW()
)
RETURNING id;
UPDATE raw_findings SET status='deduplicated' WHERE id='{{ $json.raw_finding_id }}';

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ finding_id: $('Insert Normalized Finding').first().json.id, engagement_id: $('Build Dedup Fingerprint').first().json.engagement_id }) }}

meta.description: RECON OS WF-10: Finding Deduplicator — fingerprints raw findings, merges duplicates, checks cross-engagement recurrence, inserts new normalized findings, triggers risk scoring.
